title: Municipio

infobox.value: Term | Detailed article | Administered by | Comment
*Município* is used | [Municipalities of Angola](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Angola "Municipalities of Angola") |
*Municipio* is used | [Municipalities of Argentina](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Argentina "Municipalities of Argentina") |  | According to laws of the provinces
*Municipio* is used | [Municipalities of Bolivia](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Bolivia "Municipalities of Bolivia") |  | Below provinces

*Município* is used | [Municipalities of Brazil](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Brazil "Municipalities of Brazil") |  | *Município* with elected *(Prefeito)* ([mayor](/wiki/Mayor "Mayor")) and *Vereador* (plural: *Vereadores*) (councilors).They are part of the federation [De facto](/wiki/De_facto "De facto") et [De jure](/wiki/De_jure "De jure")
*Comuna* is used | [Communes of Chile](/wiki/Communes_of_Chile "Communes of Chile") | *Municipalidad* with elected *[alcalde](/wiki/Alcalde "Alcalde")* (mayor) and councilors |
*Municipio* is used | [Municipalities of Colombia](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Colombia "Municipalities of Colombia") |  | Below departments

*Municipalidad* is used | [Municipalities of Costa Rica](/w/index.php?title=Municipalities_of_Costa_Rica&action=edit&redlink=1 "Municipalities of Costa Rica (page does not exist)") |  | Coterminous with the *[Cantones](/wiki/Cantons_of_Costa_Rica "Cantons of Costa Rica")*
*Municipio* is used | [Municipalities of Cuba](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Cuba "Municipalities of Cuba") |  |

*Municipio* is used | [Municipalities of the Dominican Republic](/wiki/Municipalities_of_the_Dominican_Republic "Municipalities of the Dominican Republic") | *[ayuntamiento](/wiki/Ayuntamiento "Ayuntamiento")* (elected municipal council) and *[síndico](/wiki/Syndic "Syndic")* (mayor) |

*Município* is used | [Municipalities of East Timor](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Timor-Leste "Municipalities of Timor-Leste") | *Autoridade Municipal* (Municipal Authority), with a president (*presidente*), along with a Municipal Council (*Concelho Municipal*) |

*Cantón* is used | [Cantons of Ecuador](/wiki/Cantons_of_Ecuador "Cantons of Ecuador") | *Municipio* or *Municipalidad* with elected *[alcalde](/wiki/Alcalde "Alcalde")* (mayor) and *concejales* (councilors) | Below [provinces](/wiki/Provinces_of_Ecuador "Provinces of Ecuador"). Further subdivided into urban and rural [parishes](/wiki/Parishes_of_Ecuador "Parishes of Ecuador").
*Municipio* is used | [Municipalities of El Salvador](/wiki/Municipalities_of_El_Salvador "Municipalities of El Salvador") | *[Alcalde](/wiki/Alcalde "Alcalde")* | Below departments
*Municipio* is used | [Municipalities of Equatorial Guinea](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Equatorial_Guinea "Municipalities of Equatorial Guinea") | *[Alcalde](/wiki/Alcalde "Alcalde")* |
*Municipio* is used | [Municipalities of Guatemala](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Guatemala "Municipalities of Guatemala") | *Municipalidad* | Below departments
*Municipalidad* is used | [Municipalities of Honduras](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Honduras "Municipalities of Honduras") | *[Alcalde](/wiki/Alcalde "Alcalde")* | Below departments

*[Comune](/wiki/Comune "Comune")* is used; in some parts of Italy the *municipio* is the building housing the administration of the comune; elsewhere it is simply called *comune*. A *municipalità* may be a subdivision of *[comune](/wiki/Comune "Comune")*[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*][[a]](#cite_note-example-4) | [Municipalities of Italy](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Italy "Municipalities of Italy") | [Consiglio comunale](/w/index.php?title=Consiglio_comunale&action=edit&redlink=1 "Consiglio comunale (page does not exist)"), headed by a [sindaco](/wiki/Sindaco "Sindaco") |

*Municipio* is used | [Municipalities of Mexico](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Mexico "Municipalities of Mexico") | *[Ayuntamiento](/wiki/Ayuntamiento "Ayuntamiento")*, headed by a [municipal president](/wiki/Municipal_president "Municipal president") | Below states
*Município* is used | [Municipalities of Mozambique](/w/index.php?title=Municipalities_of_Mozambique&action=edit&redlink=1 "Municipalities of Mozambique (page does not exist)") |
*Municipio* is used | [Municipalities of Nicaragua](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Nicaragua "Municipalities of Nicaragua") | *[Alcalde](/wiki/Alcalde "Alcalde")* | Below departments
*Municipalidad* is used | [Municipalities of Paraguay](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Paraguay "Municipalities of Paraguay") |  |
*Municipalidad* is used | [Municipalities of Peru](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Peru "Municipalities of Peru") |  |

*Municipio* (munisipyo) and sometimes *municipalidad* (municipalidad) are used[[b]](#cite_note-5) | [Municipalities of the Philippines](/wiki/Municipalities_of_the_Philippines "Municipalities of the Philippines") | Elected *[alcalde](/wiki/Alcalde "Alcalde")* (alkalde, “mayor”)[[c]](#cite_note-6) as the executive, *vicealcalde* (bise alkalde, “vice mayor”)[[d]](#cite_note-7) and *concejales* (konsehal, “councilor”) of the *[Sangguniang Bayan](/wiki/Sangguniang_Bayan "Sangguniang Bayan")*[[e]](#cite_note-8) (Ayuntamiento, “Municipal Council”). | Below provinces (except [Pateros](/wiki/Pateros "Pateros")); equivalent to a town; has a lower income than a [city](/wiki/Cities_of_the_Philippines "Cities of the Philippines")[[f]](#cite_note-9) (*ciudad*). Like a city, it is also further subdivided into [barangays](/wiki/Barangay "Barangay").

*Município* is used (also called *[concelho](/wiki/Concelho "Concelho")*) | [Municipalities of Portugal](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Portugal "Municipalities of Portugal") | [Câmara Municipal](/wiki/C%C3%A2mara_Municipal "Câmara Municipal") (executive) and [Assembleia Municipal](/wiki/Assembleia_Municipal "Assembleia Municipal") (legislative) |

*Municipio* is used | [Municipalities of Puerto Rico](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Puerto_Rico "Municipalities of Puerto Rico") | *[Alcalde](/wiki/Alcalde "Alcalde")* and municipal [legislature](/wiki/Legislature "Legislature") |

*Municipio* is used[[g]](#cite_note-10) | [Municipalities of Spain](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Spain "Municipalities of Spain") | *[Ayuntamiento](/wiki/Ayuntamiento_(Spain) "Ayuntamiento (Spain)")* ([municipal corporation](/wiki/Municipal_corporation "Municipal corporation")) or *[Concejo abierto](/wiki/Concejo_abierto "Concejo abierto")*, headed by an *alcalde* |
*Municipio* is used[[4]](#cite_note-11) | [Municipalities of Uruguay](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Uruguay "Municipalities of Uruguay") | *Alcaldía* (municipal council), headed by an *alcalde* |

*Municipio* is used | [Municipalities of Venezuela](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Venezuela "Municipalities of Venezuela") | *Consejo Municipal* (municipal council) with separately elected *alcalde* and independent comptroller | Below state

*Municipalità* refers only to administration, whereas *comune* refers to both administration and territory; it is also an administrative sub-division of a large city, such as [Rome](/wiki/Rome "Rome").

In [Tagalog](/wiki/Tagalog_language "Tagalog language") *bayan* (IPA: [[ˈbaː.jɐn̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Tagalog "Help:IPA/Tagalog")), [Cebuan](/wiki/Cebuano_language "Cebuano language") *lungsod* (IPA: [[ˈl̪uŋ.s̪od̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Iloco](/wiki/Ilocano_language "Ilocano language") *ili* (IPA: [[ˈʔi.li]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Hiligaynon](/wiki/Hiligaynon_language "Hiligaynon language") *banwa* (IPA: [[ˈban.wa]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Central Bicol](/wiki/Central_Bikol_language "Central Bikol language") *banwaan* (IPA: [[ban̪ˈwa.ʔan̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Waray](/wiki/Waray_language "Waray language") *bungto* (IPA: [[ˈbuŋ.toʔ]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Kapampangan](/wiki/Kapampangan_language "Kapampangan language") *balen* (IPA: [[bəˈlɛːn]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Pangasinan](/wiki/Pangasinan_language "Pangasinan language") *baley* (IPA: [[ˈba.lɨɪ̯]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")).

In [Tagalog](/wiki/Tagalog_language "Tagalog language") *punong-bayan* (IPA: [[ˌpuː.n̪omˈbaː.jɐn̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Tagalog "Help:IPA/Tagalog")), [Cebuan](/wiki/Cebuano_language "Cebuano language") *punong-lungsod* (IPA: [[ˌpuː.n̪onˈl̪uŋ.s̪od̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Tagalog "Help:IPA/Tagalog")), [Iloco](/wiki/Ilocano_language "Ilocano language") *basar* (IPA: [[baˈsaɾ]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")).

In [Tagalog](/wiki/Tagalog_language "Tagalog language") *pangalawang punong-bayan* (IPA: [[pɐ.ŋɐ.lɐˌwam puː.n̪omˈbaː.jɐn̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Tagalog "Help:IPA/Tagalog")), [Cebuan](/wiki/Cebuano_language "Cebuano language") *puli-punong-lungsod* (Cebuano pronunciation: [[pu.li.pu.n̪onˈl̪uŋ.s̪od̪IPA]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Iloco](/wiki/Ilocano_language "Ilocano language") *kasandi a basar* (IPA: [[kasanˈdi a baˈsaɾ]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")).
In [Tagalog](/wiki/Tagalog_language "Tagalog language") *Sangguniang Bayan* (IPA: [[sɐŋ.ɡʊ.n̪ɪˌʔam ˈbaː.jɐn̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Tagalog "Help:IPA/Tagalog")

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Administrative divisions in Italy and in several Hispanophone and Lusophone nations

A ****municipio**** (Spanish: [[muniˈθipjo, muniˈsipjo]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Spanish "Help:IPA/Spanish")) or ****município**** (Portuguese: [[muniˈsipju, muniˈsipiu]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Portuguese "Help:IPA/Portuguese")) is an [administrative division](/wiki/Administrative_division "Administrative division") in several [Hispanophone](/wiki/Hispanophone "Hispanophone") and [Lusophone](/wiki/Lusophone "Lusophone") nations, respectively. It is often translated as '[municipality](/wiki/Municipality "Municipality")' in English. It comes from *mūnicipium* (Latin: [[muːnɪˈkɪpiʊ̃ˑ]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Latin "Help:IPA/Latin")), meaning 'township'.

In English, a municipality is often defined as relating to a single city or town,[[1]](#cite_note-definition-1) but in Spanish, the term *municipio* may not refer to a single city or town but rather a jurisdiction with several towns and cities such as a [township](/wiki/Township "Township"), [county](/wiki/County "County"), [borough](/wiki/Borough "Borough") or [civil parish](/wiki/Parish_(administrative_division) "Parish (administrative division)").[[2]](#cite_note-connotations-2) The [Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language") term *municipalità* (IPA: [[muniˌt͡ʃipaliˈta]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Italian "Help:IPA/Italian")) refers to a single city or to a group of cities and towns in a township, and the term *municipio* (IPA: [[muniˈt͡ʃiːpjo]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Italian "Help:IPA/Italian")) is used for city subdivisions. On the other hand, usage of *município* in Portuguese is almost entirely restricted to a cluster of cities or towns such as a county or township. However, in [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil"), a *município* is an independent city and a public corporation with the status of a federated entity.[[3]](#cite_note-Portuguese-3) In the Philippines, a *munisipyo* (Tagalog: [[mʊnɪˈsipjo]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Tagalog "Help:IPA/Tagalog")) may refer to a [town hall](/wiki/Town_hall "Town hall").

## Overview

| Chile | *Comuna* is used | [Communes of Chile](/wiki/Communes_of_Chile "Communes of Chile") | *Municipalidad* with elected *[alcalde](/wiki/Alcalde "Alcalde")* (mayor) and councilors |  |

| Spain | *Municipio* is used[[g]](#cite_note-10) | [Municipalities of Spain](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Spain "Municipalities of Spain") | *[Ayuntamiento](/wiki/Ayuntamiento_(Spain) "Ayuntamiento (Spain)")* ([municipal corporation](/wiki/Municipal_corporation "Municipal corporation")) or *[Concejo abierto](/wiki/Concejo_abierto "Concejo abierto")*, headed by an *alcalde* |  |
| Uruguay | *Municipio* is used[[4]](#cite_note-11) | [Municipalities of Uruguay](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Uruguay "Municipalities of Uruguay") | *Alcaldía* (municipal council), headed by an *alcalde* |  |
| Venezuela | *Municipio* is used | [Municipalities of Venezuela](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Venezuela "Municipalities of Venezuela") | *Consejo Municipal* (municipal council) with separately elected *alcalde* and independent comptroller | Below state |

## Notes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Municipio&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Notes")]

1. **[^](#cite_ref-example_4-0)** *Municipalità* refers only to administration, whereas *comune* refers to both administration and territory; it is also an administrative sub-division of a large city, such as [Rome](/wiki/Rome "Rome").
2. **[^](#cite_ref-5)** In [Tagalog](/wiki/Tagalog_language "Tagalog language") *bayan* (IPA: [[ˈbaː.jɐn̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Tagalog "Help:IPA/Tagalog")), [Cebuan](/wiki/Cebuano_language "Cebuano language") *lungsod* (IPA: [[ˈl̪uŋ.s̪od̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Iloco](/wiki/Ilocano_language "Ilocano language") *ili* (IPA: [[ˈʔi.li]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Hiligaynon](/wiki/Hiligaynon_language "Hiligaynon language") *banwa* (IPA: [[ˈban.wa]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Central Bicol](/wiki/Central_Bikol_language "Central Bikol language") *banwaan* (IPA: [[ban̪ˈwa.ʔan̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Waray](/wiki/Waray_language "Waray language") *bungto* (IPA: [[ˈbuŋ.toʔ]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Kapampangan](/wiki/Kapampangan_language "Kapampangan language") *balen* (IPA: [[bəˈlɛːn]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Pangasinan](/wiki/Pangasinan_language "Pangasinan language") *baley* (IPA: [[ˈba.lɨɪ̯]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")).
3. **[^](#cite_ref-6)** In [Tagalog](/wiki/Tagalog_language "Tagalog language") *punong-bayan* (IPA: [[ˌpuː.n̪omˈbaː.jɐn̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Tagalog "Help:IPA/Tagalog")), [Cebuan](/wiki/Cebuano_language "Cebuano language") *punong-lungsod* (IPA: [[ˌpuː.n̪onˈl̪uŋ.s̪od̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Tagalog "Help:IPA/Tagalog")), [Iloco](/wiki/Ilocano_language "Ilocano language") *basar* (IPA: [[baˈsaɾ]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")).
4. **[^](#cite_ref-7)** In [Tagalog](/wiki/Tagalog_language "Tagalog language") *pangalawang punong-bayan* (IPA: [[pɐ.ŋɐ.lɐˌwam puː.n̪omˈbaː.jɐn̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Tagalog "Help:IPA/Tagalog")), [Cebuan](/wiki/Cebuano_language "Cebuano language") *puli-punong-lungsod* (Cebuano pronunciation: [[pu.li.pu.n̪onˈl̪uŋ.s̪od̪IPA]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Iloco](/wiki/Ilocano_language "Ilocano language") *kasandi a basar* (IPA: [[kasanˈdi a baˈsaɾ]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")).
5. **[^](#cite_ref-8)** In [Tagalog](/wiki/Tagalog_language "Tagalog language") *Sangguniang Bayan* (IPA: [[sɐŋ.ɡʊ.n̪ɪˌʔam ˈbaː.jɐn̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Tagalog "Help:IPA/Tagalog")).
6. **[^](#cite_ref-9)** In [Tagalog](/wiki/Tagalog_language "Tagalog language") *lungsod* (IPA: [[lʊn̪ˈsod̪̚]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Tagalog "Help:IPA/Tagalog")), [Cebuan](/wiki/Cebuano_language "Cebuano language") *dakbayan* (IPA: [[d̪ɐk.bɐˈjan̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Iloco](/wiki/Ilocano_language "Ilocano language") *dak-ili* (IPA: [[dɐkˈʔi.li]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Hiligaynon](/wiki/Hiligaynon_language "Hiligaynon language") *dakbanwa* (IPA: [[dakˈban.wa]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Central Bicol](/wiki/Central_Bikol_language "Central Bikol language") *dakbanwaan* (IPA: [[dak.ban̪ˈwa.ʔan̪]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")), [Kapampangan](/wiki/Kapampangan_language "Kapampangan language") *lakanbalen* (IPA: [[lə.xəm.bəˈlɛn]](/wiki/Help:IPA "Help:IPA")).
7. **[^](#cite_ref-10)** In [Catalan](/wiki/Catalan_language "Catalan language") *municipi* (IPA: [[muniˈsipi]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Catalan "Help:IPA/Catalan")), [Galician](/wiki/Galician_language "Galician language") *municipio* (IPA: [[muniˈθipjʊ]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Galician "Help:IPA/Galician")) or *bisbarra* (IPA: [[bizˈβarɐ]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Galician "Help:IPA/Galician")) and [Basque](/wiki/Basque_language "Basque language") *udalerria* (IPA: [[udaleria]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Basque "Help:IPA/Basque")).
